message: Command `find / -type f \( -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.txt" \) 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "vul" && echo "{}"' 2>/dev/null | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"command": "find / -type f \\( -name \"*.tar.gz\" -o -name \"*.txt\" \\) 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf \"{}\" 2>/dev/null | grep -q \"vul\" && echo \"{}\"' 2>/dev/null | head -20"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command: find / -type f \( -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.txt" \) 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "vul" && echo "{}"' 2>/dev/null | head -20
